name: Chicken Lickin'
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken parts and pat dry.
2. Melt the butter in a skillet over medium heat.
3. Brown the chicken on all sides in the butter, turning occasionally until cooked through.
4. Place the chicken in the slow cooker.
5. In a bowl, combine the remaining ingredients except the heavy cream.
6. Mix well and pour over the chicken.
7. Cook on LOW for 8 to 10 hours.
8. Stir in the heavy cream just before serving.
9. Serve over hot spaghetti.
